branch.branch_summary: After v6.2.0, run a runtime-backed frontier review before opening the next implementation task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.2 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Maintain v6.2.0 as the Worked Adoption Proof baseline and choose the next AOF frontier through runtime-backed review before opening implementation.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: After v6.2.0, run a runtime-backed frontier review before opening the next implementation task.
